lenses.description: The final and most refined RED Pro Zoom, a spherically tuned Super 35 lens built for RED's DSMC bodies but at home on any PL cine camera. It pairs a versatile wide-to-portrait range with a constant aperture, minimal breathing and Cooke /i metadata in a rugged traditional cine housing. Discontinued and available on the used market.

lenses.description: A spherically tuned Super 35 workhorse zoom from RED, covering wide to short-telephoto with consistent brightness and minimal breathing across the range. Its sturdy cine housing and geared rings suit the larger DSMC-era bodies rather than compact rigs, and it carries Cooke /i metadata. Discontinued and available on the used market.
